headline: Apple legal action targets OpenAI staff as talent exodus accelerates
body: Apple has sent legal letters to dozens of OpenAI employees, marking an escalation in competitive pressure within the generative AI space. The move reflects intensifying talent wars between major tech players as healthcare systems evaluate which AI vendors and partnerships will shape their future workflows. For healthcare organizations currently assessing OpenAI's clinical applications in EHR integration and decision support, this signals potential instability in vendor roadmaps and employee expertise. The broader context of internal OpenAI friction, copyright disputes, and regulatory scrutiny compounds concerns about long-term platform reliability and governance that health systems factor into enterprise AI contracts. Healthcare AI consulting conversations should now explicitly address vendor stability and whether healthcare clients should diversify their generative AI dependencies.
